benefits: Elettaria punicea is a lesser-known species of ginger native to the Western Ghats in India.  Research on the health benefits of Elettaria punicea is limited, but some studies suggest it may have anti-inflammatory properties and antioxidant effects. The plant is also believed to have antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which could aid in wound healing and infection prevention. More research is needed to fully understand the potential health benefits of Elettaria punicea. However, traditional medicine has utilized the plant for various purposes for centuries, further highlighting its potential value.
